text.title: Difficult Conversations Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: separate-facts-and-story
step.action: Write observable FACT field separately from STORY field; strip any evaluation into STORY.

step.name: select-format
step.action: Live channel → STATE. Async written → DESC.

step.name: draft-opening
step.action: Compose STATE (5 sentences max) or DESC (4 blocks).

step.name: add-wwwf-close
step.action: Specify who, what, when, follow_up. No vague commitments allowed.

step.name: validate-and-rehearse
step.action: Run `validate-difficult-conversations.py`. Read STATE aloud once; if it sounds rehearsed, simplify wording.
